mapper.sql: dm_auth_verify.id id, dm_auth_verify.gmt_create gmt_create, dm_auth_verify.gmt_modified gmt_modified, dm_auth_verify.account_type account_type, dm_auth_verify.uid uid, dm_auth_verify.verify_type verify_type, dm_auth_verify.email email, dm_auth_verify.phone phone, dm_auth_verify.verify_code verify_code, dm_auth_verify.verify_code_type verify_code_type, dm_auth_verify.verify_code_send_time verify_code_send_time, dm_auth_verify.fail_times fail_times, dm_auth_verify.last_fail_date last_fail_date
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM dm_auth_verify WHERE verify_type = #{verifyType,javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.platform.dal.model.auth.VerifyType} AND verify_code_type=#{verifyCodeType,javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.platform.dal.model.auth.VerifyCodeType} AND email=#{email} AND account_type='PRIMARY_ACCOUNT'

SELECT
FROM dm_auth_verify WHERE verify_type = #{verifyType,javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.platform.dal.model.auth.VerifyType} AND verify_code_type=#{verifyCodeType,javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.platform.dal.model.auth.VerifyCodeType} AND phone=#{phone} AND account_type='PRIMARY_ACCOUNT'
